vay794Disposition.reason: No real Xendit production or staging webhook/API runtime configuration has been found; synthetic replay evidence is retained but is not required for VAY-794 go/no-go.
vay794Disposition.followUp: VAY-840 or successor issue if real Xendit runtime usage is confirmed.

evidence: No XENDIT_SECRET_KEY or XENDIT_WEBHOOK_SECRET is present in production SSM Parameter Store or Secrets Manager.
Only /vayada/staging/xendit-webhook-secret exists, and it is a generated replay placeholder for C1 fixture signing.
Current platform ECS Terraform does not inject Xendit secrets into deployed production services.
